title: clerodendrum ohwii
intro: Clerodendrum ohwii, also known as the tropical glorybower, is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and has been found to have various health benefits such as reducing fever and treating respiratory issues. The leaves and flowers of the Clerodendrum ohwii plant can be used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to promote health and well-being. In addition, the plant's extracts have been studied for their potential in developing new treatments for diseases, making it a valuable resource in the field of natural medicine.
